simple_types.name: gsl_complex
simple_types.code:
type gsl_complex is new double_complex_types.Complex with
   Convention => C_Pass_By_Copy;

array_types.name: gsl_complex_array2600
array_types.code: type gsl_complex_array2600 is array (0 .. 1) of aliased double;

documentation.description:
type gsl_complex_c is record
   dat : aliased gsl_complex_array2600;  -- /usr/include/gsl/gsl_complex.h:136
end record
with Convention => C_Pass_By_Copy;  -- /usr/include/gsl/gsl_complex.h:136

array_types.name: gsl_complex_complex_array
array_types.code: type gsl_complex_complex_array is array (Natural range <>) of gsl_complex;

array_types.name: gsl_complex_float_array2606
array_types.code: type gsl_complex_float_array2606 is array (0 .. 1) of aliased float;

array_types.name: gsl_complex_long_double_array2603
array_types.code:
type gsl_complex_long_double_array2603 is
  array (0 .. 1) of aliased long_double;

gsl_complex_float
gsl_complex_long_double
